title: Stella Ruby
body:
A lightweight Minecraft PvP client optimized for fast lag-free gameplay and seamless online experiences. 

This client is designed to provide a smooth and responsive gaming experience, making it 
ideal for competitive players especially in hypixel. Its compact size ensures minimal resource 
usage, allowing you to play without any significant performance drops.

The client also features an easy-to-use interface with customizable settings, giving you 
full control over your gameplay experience. Additionally, the client includes cosmetic support, allowing you to customize your gameplay experience with a wide range of options.
